description_long: This is a sophisticated, contemporary sofa with a gently curved back and arms, upholstered in a smooth, taupe-colored material. The backrest features deep diamond tufting, giving it a classic, luxurious appearance, while the seat consists of two large, flat cushions that appear plush and comfortable. The armrests are integrated into the curved back, rising to the same height and providing a seamless, enveloping silhouette. The sofa stands on four slender, tapered legs with a metallic finish, adding a touch of elegance and elevating the piece off the ground. The rear of the sofa is plain and smoothly upholstered, maintaining a clean and modern look. This design is both inviting and stylish, suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or residential living rooms.
description: A curved, taupe sofa with deep diamond tufting on the backrest, two large seat cushions, and slender metallic legs. The design is elegant and modern, with a seamless, enveloping silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width, deep diamond-tufted backrest, two large seat cushions, and the curved, integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's gentle curve, the height of the armrest relative to the seat, and the depth of the seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the continuous curve of the sofa's frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the gentle curve and armrest height, with a clear view of the sofa's profile and leg placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions with attached, deeply tufted backrest; cushions are not loose and the backrest is continuous.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated, curved armrests at the same height as the backrest, smoothly padded and continuous with the sofa's frame, no distinct separation or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, tapered legs with a metallic finish, positioned at the corners, slightly angled outward, fully exposed and visually distinct.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and curved backrest with deep diamond tufting; seamlessly integrated with the armrests and frame.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid taupe color with a prominent diamond-tufted pattern on the backrest; seat and sides are smooth with no visible stitching or additional patterning.
